{{Quote|No, I can't return to Devaron. I…haven't made enough money yet.|Trynic|<ref name="GG6-1" />}}
'''Trynic''' was the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and owner of the modified [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] [[Solar Flare (YT-1300 light freighter)|''Solar Flare'']].

==Biography==
Hailing from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]], Trynic was widely regarded as the best [[Tramp freighter/Legends|tramp freighter]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]]. Known as a shrewd bargainer with a quick mind, Trynic usually came out ahead on any deal he made. He has managed to turn a tidy profit with the ''Solar Flare'', reinvesting his profits to earn even more.

==Personality and traits==
His typical [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] appearance (red-tinted skin, sharp teeth, and a pair of horns atop his head) combined with his exceptionally piercing eyes earned him the nickname of "The Devil" from the other tramp freighter captains in the Minos Cluster.
